slamfitness.name: Slam Fitness
slamfitness.tagline: Every rep remembered. Every milestone earned.

activities.name: Session Complete
activities.description: Attend any scheduled class or open gym session to earn your base Forge Points.

activities.name: Off-Peak Athlete
activities.description: Attend a session during a designated quiet period (Tuesday or Thursday, 10am–3pm).

activities.name: New Personal Record
activities.description: Log a verified lift PR with coach confirmation to claim your achievement points.

activities.name: 7-Day Streak
activities.description: Complete all scheduled sessions across a full 7-day window without missing a single one.

activities.name: 30-Day Streak
activities.description: Complete all scheduled sessions across a 30-day window — a rare feat celebrated publicly in the gym.

activities.name: Challenge Enrolled
activities.description: Sign up for any gym challenge or programme block to earn your enrolment points.

activities.name: Challenge Completed
activities.description: See a full gym challenge or 8–12 week programme cycle through to completion.

activities.name: Refer a Friend
activities.description: Earn points when a friend you referred completes their first full paid month of membership.

activities.name: Social Tag
activities.description: Tag @SlamFitness in a public training post — opt-in only, maximum once per week.

activities.name: Coach Feedback
activities.description: Submit a coach or session review to help improve the programme — maximum twice per month.

activities.name: Programme Week Complete
activities.description: Log all prescribed sessions within a given programme week to earn your consistency bonus.

activities.name: First Session of the Month
activities.description: Attend your first session in any calendar month to trigger this low-friction re-engagement reward.

activities.name: Bring a Guest
activities.description: Bring a non-member guest along to a guest pass session and introduce them to the floor.

activities.name: Milestone Anniversary
activities.description: Awarded automatically on your 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month membership anniversaries.

rewards.name: Protein Shake
rewards.description: Redeem for one post-session shake from the Slam Fitness bar — your recovery, covered.

rewards.name: Priority Class Booking
rewards.description: Unlock a 48-hour early booking window for one full week of classes, beating the standard 24-hour window.

rewards.name: Guest Day Pass
rewards.description: Bring a friend for a free single session — a genuine try-before-you-buy that doubles as a referral seed.

rewards.name: Slam Kit — Water Bottle
rewards.description: Claim a branded Slam Fitness stainless steel bottle to carry your training identity off the floor.

rewards.name: 1-on-1 Programming Session
rewards.description: Book a 30-minute private session with a coach to design your next personalised training block.

rewards.name: Slam Kit — Training Tee
rewards.description: Earn a premium Slam Fitness training top — identity wear that marks you as part of the community.

rewards.name: One Month Membership Credit
rewards.description: Have one full month knocked off your membership — a reward reserved for the gym's highest-tier members.

rewards.name: The IRON RECORD Plaque
rewards.description: Receive a physical custom-engraved plaque recording your top 5 all-time PRs — the ultimate proof of who you've become.
